sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19299" key="bambradw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαμβρᾰδών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βεμβράς</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
